response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML modeling, and formal project management — critical for this role — and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (DLang, Node.js, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks documented experience leading teams or managing client projects at executive level
